modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with hazardous waste cleanup in the lab.

full_description_text:  
I had a chemical spill in the lab.  
Not sure how to clean it up.  
I need guidance on handling hazardous waste.
short_description: Need help with hazardous waste cleanup in the lab.
